# TS9212

**Category:** Macro Syntax · **Severity:** Error

## Message

```
Failed to read file: {path}
```

## Explanation

The compile-time file read operation failed.

Check that:
1. The file path is correct and relative to the source file
2. The file exists and is readable
3. The path uses forward slashes (/) on all platforms

<!-- prettier-ignore-end -->
<!-- generated:end -->
